(born 6 April 1988) is an English former actor. He is best known for playing the role of [Sid Jenkins](/wiki/Sid_Jenkins "Sid Jenkins") in the first two seasons of the British teen drama *[Skins](/wiki/Skins_(British_TV_series) "Skins (British TV series)")*.[[1]](#cite_note-telegraph-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

English actor and singer

| Mike Bailey | |
| --- | --- |
| Bailey in 2007 | |
| Born | Michael James Bailey   (1988-04-06) 6 April 1988 (age 37)  [Bristol](/wiki/Bristol "Bristol"), England |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 2002–2017 |

**Michael James Bailey** (born 6 April 1988) is an English former actor. He is best known for playing the role of [Sid Jenkins](/wiki/Sid_Jenkins "Sid Jenkins") in the first two seasons of the British teen drama *[Skins](/wiki/Skins_(British_TV_series) "Skins (British TV series)")*.[[1]](#cite_note-telegraph-1)

In 2017, Bailey left his acting career and became a teacher.[[2]](#cite_note-teacher-2)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Bailey_(actor)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

In the *Skins* series 1 finale, Bailey sang a [musical ensemble](/wiki/Musical_ensemble "Musical ensemble") version of "[Wild World](/wiki/Wild_World_(song) "Wild World (song)")" by [Cat Stevens](/wiki/Cat_Stevens "Cat Stevens"). He, along with the rest of the main cast of series 1 and 2, did not return for the third series.[[3]](#cite_note-sid-3)

He also appeared in the Channel 4 drama *[1066 The Battle for Middle Earth](/wiki/1066_The_Battle_for_Middle_Earth "1066 The Battle for Middle Earth")* as Tofi, which was broadcast in May 2009.[[4]](#cite_note-battle-4)

In March 2012, he filmed in [Birmingham](/wiki/Birmingham "Birmingham") for [teen comedy](/wiki/Teen_film "Teen film") *[We Are the Freaks](/wiki/We_Are_the_Freaks "We Are the Freaks")*,[[5]](#cite_note-freaks-5) directed by [Justin Edgar](/wiki/Justin_Edgar "Justin Edgar") and produced by Alex Usborne at [104 Films](/wiki/104_Films "104 Films"). The show released in 2013.[[5]](#cite_note-freaks-5)

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Bailey_(actor)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Personal life")]

After Bailey's last project in 2017, he completed a drama degree and completed [teacher training](/wiki/Teacher_education "Teacher education"), and now works as a [secondary school](/wiki/Secondary_school "Secondary school") drama teacher at Bedminster Down School in Bristol.

| 2010 | *[1066: The Battle for Middle Earth](/wiki/1066_The_Battle_for_Middle_Earth "1066 The Battle for Middle Earth")* | Tofi | 2 episodes [[4]](#cite_note-battle-4) |
| *Three Moments in Heaven* | Jamie |  |
| 2013 | *[We Are the Freaks](/wiki/We_Are_the_Freaks "We Are the Freaks")* | Parsons | [[5]](#cite_note-freaks-5) |
| *Faulty* | Nigel |  |
